title: serratula media
intro: Serratula media, also known as the "milk thistle of the Alps," is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and liver problems, due to its high content of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Serratula media include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and protecting the liver from damage. Serratula media can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
